label: Heavy bag · ISO1 · single pallet
description: 25 kg cement bag palletizing; 10m × 8m cell; ISO1 pallets; single station 600 cph; $250k budget.
prompt: Cement bag palletizing line. Each bag is 600 x 400 x 150 mm and weighs 25 kg. Target throughput 600 bags per hour. Cell envelope 10 m by 8 m. ISO1 pallets (1200 x 1000 mm), column stacking pattern. Heavy bag application — needs a high-payload palletizer. Budget around 250k USD.

constraints.description: ISO 13855 separation distance for body access.

assumptions: Robot payload sized for case mass + EOAT (typ. 30 kg) -> 200 kg class palletizer.
